_comment: Per-repo source-leak-gate config (cinatra-ai/ci reusable, profile default). The scaffold templates under templates/ are STILL fully scanned; this exempts ONLY the one unavoidable schema-version literal a scaffold dashboard.json carries ("apiVersion": "vN.N"). lineExcludes apply to every active rule, so the regex is FULL-LINE-ANCHORED to that exact JSON shape — it cannot mask a token anywhere else on a line. cinatra#402 fold.
